title: Negative Value Accepted in Pricing Parameter

cwe.note: Improper Input Validation: server accepts domain-impossible value without rejection or normalization
Improper Validation of Specified Quantity in Input: negative distance is outside any valid domain range
Business Logic Errors: the pricing engine computes a result for an impossible real-world input

owasp_top10.note: Insecure Design: missing domain constraint on a business-critical parameter

owasp_api10.note: Security Misconfiguration: API accepts out-of-range values without schema or domain enforcement
Unrestricted Access to Sensitive Business Flows: unauthenticated quotation endpoint with no input guardrails

bugcrowd_vrt.note: No direct VRT node for domain validation gaps; closest umbrella is server misconfiguration
